entries.title: Multi-Agent Research System (deep_research)
entries.stack: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini · Python · Gradio · SendGrid · asyncio
bullets: Architected a 4-agent pipeline: planner decomposes the query into 5 strategic web searches with reasoning, search runs them concurrently and summarizes each in 300 words, writer synthesizes a 1,000+ word markdown report with follow-ups, email formats and delivers HTML via SendGrid.
Implemented real-time streamed status through Gradio with per-agent error isolation — a failed search doesn't break the run.
Each agent exposes a strict Pydantic contract, making the system extensible — swap the search agent without touching the writer.

entries.title: Personal AI Agent (portfolio chatbot)
bullets: Portfolio chatbot ingests a LinkedIn PDF + professional summary and answers questions in-character.
OpenAI function calling for lead capture and unknown-question logging, both triggering real-time Pushover notifications for continuous improvement.
Tight persona control via system prompt — steers toward professional networking without breaking character.

entries.title: LLM Engineering — Applied GenAI Studies
entries.stack: OpenAI · Anthropic · Gemini · HuggingFace · LangChain · Chroma · Whisper
bullets: RAG knowledge worker: LangChain retrieval chain over a local corpus, Chroma vector store, OpenAI embeddings, conversational Gradio front end.
Meeting-minutes pipeline: Whisper transcription → HuggingFace tokenizer + streaming LLM inference → structured markdown with summaries, takeaways, and action items.
Multi-model chatbot with runtime model selection across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini with streaming responses.
